_comment: Primitive design values. Consumed by BOTH src/theme/tokens.ts (TypeScript/StyleSheet) and tailwind.config.js (NativeWind utility classes). Editing here updates both. See docs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md.

palette._comment: Every value below is quoted verbatim from UI Experience Bible Part 21 (Color Palette). Do not add a hue that does not appear there. The 50-900 primary ramp is not yet documented, so no primary tints/shades exist yet.

effects._comment: Not part of the Part 21 palette. Shadow is an occlusion effect rather than a brand hue, so it lives outside `palette` to keep that object a verbatim copy of the spec.
